description: CompositionLightweight dark brown outdoor sandals made of synthetic leather with EVA massage footbed, support back strap, adjustable velcro straps and multi-directional outsoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washThis premium pair of outdoor sandals from adidas is loaded with subtle and stylish embossing making it a perfect footwear for casual occasions. A clean and sporty footwear with adjustable straps, this pair of sandals from adidas has an akle support strap that helps keep the feet in place comfortably. The full-length EVA massage footbed ensures your feet are never tired, while the multi-directional rubber outsole helps maintain absolute support and grip. The open cuts enhance breathability for the feet during summer, while you can pair them with woollen socks for the colder months.
